acceptance_criteria: All IPC connections require token-based authentication
AO_CLAUDE_BYPASS_PERMISSIONS defaults to false (opt-in, not opt-out)
Auth tokens are auto-provisioned when the agent runner starts
E2e integration tests validate the full IPC auth handshake
description: Ensure runner IPC authentication is enforced, dangerous permission bypasses are opt-in not opt-out, and dev-token fallbacks are removed for production safety. TASK-027 defaulted AO_CLAUDE_BYPASS_PERMISSIONS to false. TASK-028 implemented IPC authentication on the agent-runner socket with token validation. TASK-038 (in-progress) adds e2e integration tests for the IPC auth token flow.
title: Harden IPC and runtime security defaults
